name: Weekly Report Generation & Email
description: Every Monday morning, pull data from a Google Sheet, generate a summary, and email a formatted weekly report to stakeholders.

nodes.name: Read KPI Sheet
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_KPI_SPREADSHEET_ID with your sheet ID.

nodes.name: Email Report

parameters.subject: Weekly KPI Report — week of {{$json["week"]}}
parameters.message:
Weekly KPI Report — {{$json["week"]}}

MetricValue
Total Revenue{{$json["totalRevenue"]}}
Total Leads{{$json["totalLeads"]}}
Avg Daily Revenue{{$json["avgDailyRevenue"]}}

Generated automatically by n8n.

nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_EMAIL with the recipients. Requires Gmail OAuth2 credentials.

setupSteps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Workflows → Import from File).
2. Create a Google Sheet named "Weekly KPIs" with columns: Date, Revenue, Leads.
4. Set up Gmail OAuth2 and Google Sheets credentials in n8n.
